lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਰਖੀਐ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee har dhiaaeeai antar rakheeai ur dhaar |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, I meditate on the Lord; I enshrine Him deep within my heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸਹੁ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਨ ਦੇਵਈ ਕਿਆ ਚਲੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: so sahu saant na devee kiaa chalai tis naal |
lines.english: My Husband Lord has not blessed me with peace and tranquility; what will work with Him?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਘਰਿ ਬੈਠਿਆ ਸਹੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਾ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕੀਤੀ ਕਰਤਾਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak ghar baitthiaa sahu paaeaa jaa kirapaa keetee karataar |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, seated in his her own home, she finds her Husband Lord, when the Creator Lord grants His Grace. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਧਾ ਧਾਵਤ ਦਿਨੁ ਗਇਆ ਰੈਣਿ ਗਵਾਈ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: dhandhaa dhaavat din geaa rain gavaaee soe |
lines.english: Chasing after worldly affairs, the day is wasted, and the night passes in sleep.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੁ ਬੋਲਿ ਬਿਖੁ ਖਾਇਆ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਚਲਿਆ ਰੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: koorr bol bikh khaaeaa manamukh chaliaa roe |
lines.english: Speaking lies, one eats poison; the self-willed manmukh departs, crying out in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਚੇਤਿਓ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: har naam kade na chetio fir aavan jaanaa hoe |
lines.english: He never even thinks of the Name of the Lord; over and over again, he comes and goes in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੈ ਉਪਰਿ ਜਮ ਡੰਡੁ ਹੈ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਪਤਿ ਖੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sirai upar jam ddandd hai doojai bhaae pat khoe |
lines.english: The Mesenger of Death holds his club over the mortal's head; in the love of duality, he loses his honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਜਮ ਡੰਡੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee har man vasai jam ddandd na laagai koe |
lines.english: But if, by Guru's Grace, the Lord's Name comes to dwell in his mind, then the Messenger of Death will not strike him down with his club.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਹਜੇ ਮਿਲਿ ਰਹੈ ਕਰਮਿ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sahaje mil rahai karam paraapat hoe |2|
lines.english: Then, O Nanak, he merges intuitively into the Lord, receiving His Grace. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਆਪਣੀ ਸਿਫਤੀ ਲਾਇਅਨੁ ਦੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਮਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: eik aapanee sifatee laaeian de satigur matee |
lines.english: Some are linked to His Praises, when the Lord blesses them with the Guru's Teachings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨਾ ਨੋ ਨਾਉ ਬਖਸਿਓਨੁ ਅਸਥਿਰੁ ਹਰਿ ਸਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: eikanaa no naau bakhasion asathir har satee |
lines.english: Some are blessed with the Name of the eternal, unchanging True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉਣੁ ਪਾਣੀ ਬੈਸੰਤਰੋ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਭਗਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: paun paanee baisantaro hukam kareh bhagatee |
lines.english: Water, air and fire, by His Will, worship Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਇਕੋ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਮੰਨਿਐ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sabh iko hukam varatadaa maniai sukh paaee |3|
lines.english: The Hukam, the Command of the One Lord is all-pervasive; accepting it, peace is found. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਨਾ ਨੋ ਭਉ ਅਗਲਾ ਪੂਰੀ ਬਣਤ ਬਣਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: enaa no bhau agalaa pooree banat banatee |
lines.english: They are held in the Fear of God; He has formed the perfect form.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਕਸਉਟੀ ਸੋ ਸਹੈ ਜੋ ਮਰਜੀਵਾ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: raam ksauttee so sahai jo marajeevaa hoe |1|
lines.english: He alone passes this test of the Lord, who remains dead while yet alive. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਬੀਰ ਕਸਉਟੀ ਰਾਮ ਕੀ ਝੂਠਾ ਟਿਕੈ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: kabeer ksauttee raam kee jhootthaa ttikai na koe |
lines.english: Kabeer, such is the touchstone of the Lord; the false cannot even touch it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਉ ਕਰਿ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਰੀਐ ਕਿਉ ਕਰਿ ਮਿਰਤਕੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: kiau kar ihu man maareeai kiau kar miratak hoe |
lines.english: How can this mind be conquered? How can it be killed?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਬਖਸੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਘਨੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਕੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak jis no bakhase tis milai tis bighan na laagai koe |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, one whom the Lord forgives is united with Him, and then no obstacles block his way. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਹਉਮੈ ਛੁਟੈ ਜੀਵਨ ਮੁਕਤੁ ਸੋ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee haumai chhuttai jeevan mukat so hoe |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, egotism is eradicated, and then, one is Jivan Mukta - liberated while yet alive.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਿਆ ਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਮਾਨਈ ਹਉਮੈ ਛਡੈ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: kahiaa sabad na maanee haumai chhaddai na koe |
lines.english: If one does not accept the Word of the Shabad, egotism does not depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਤ ਮਰਣਾ ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਕਹੈ ਜੀਵਨ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਕਿਉ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jeevat maranaa sabh ko kahai jeevan mukat kiau hoe |
lines.english: Everyone can say that they are dead while yet alive; how can they be liberated while yet alive?

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਸੁਖ ਸਹਜੇ ਬਿਖੁ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਨਾਮਿ ਤਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: anadin gun gaavai sukh sahaje bikh bhavajal naam taree |
lines.english: night and day, he sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord. In celestial peace and poise, he crosses over the poisonous, terrifying world-ocean, through the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਕਾ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਜੇ ਕਰੇ ਦਾਰੂ ਭਾਉ ਲਾਏਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhai kaa sanjam je kare daaroo bhaau laaee |
lines.english: If someone restrains himself through the Fear of God, and takes the medicine of the Love of God,

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜਾ ਭਾਉ ਰਚਾਇਓਨੁ ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਵਰਤਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: doojaa bhaau rachaaeon trai gun varataaraa |
lines.english: God created the love of duality, and the three modes which pervade the universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh paaeeai jaa kau nadar karee |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh finds the Lord; he is blessed with His Glance of Grace. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਡਿਤ ਪੜਦੇ ਜੋਤਕੀ ਨਾ ਬੂਝਹਿ ਬੀਚਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: panddit parrade jotakee naa boojheh beechaaraa |
lines.english: The Pandits, the religious scholars, and the astrologers study their books, but they do not understand contemplation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮਾ ਬਿਸਨੁ ਮਹੇਸੁ ਉਪਾਇਅਨੁ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਕਮਾਵਨਿ ਕਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: brahamaa bisan mahes upaaeian hukam kamaavan kaaraa |
lines.english: He created Brahma, Vishnu and Shiva, who act according to His Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਖੇਲੁ ਹੈ ਸਚੁ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh teraa khel hai sach sirajanahaaraa |
lines.english: Everything is Your play, O True Creator Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਖਸਿ ਲੈਹਿ ਸਚਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jis bhaavai tis bakhas laihi sach sabad samaaee |4|
lines.english: As it pleases You, You bless us with forgiveness, and merge us in the True Word of the Shabad. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮੇ ਭੂਲਾ ਸਭਿ ਤੀਰਥ ਗਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: bharame bhoolaa sabh teerath gahai |
lines.english: Deluded by doubt, he visits all the sacred shrines of pilgrimage.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕਾ ਝੂਠਾ ਝੂਠੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: man kaa jhootthaa jhootth kamaavai |
lines.english: The man of false mind practices falsehood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਨੋ ਫਿਰੈ ਤਪਾ ਸਦਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa no firai tapaa sadaavai |
lines.english: He runs after Maya, and yet pretends to be a man of disciplined meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋ ਤਪਾ ਮੋਖੰਤਰੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak so tapaa mokhantar paavai |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, such a man of disciplined meditation attains liberation. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਤਪਾ ਕੈਸੇ ਪਰਮ ਗਤਿ ਲਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: ohu tapaa kaise param gat lahai |
lines.english: How can such a man of disciplined meditation attain the supreme status?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਕੋ ਸਚੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee ko sach kamaavai |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, one lives the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਨੋ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਬਦੁ ਸਮਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur no milai sabad samaale |
lines.english: Meeting with the True Guru, he contemplates the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਤਪਾ ਜਿ ਇਹੁ ਤਪੁ ਘਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: so tapaa ji ihu tap ghaale |
lines.english: He alone is a man of disciplined meditation, who practices this self-discipline.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਇਹੁ ਤਪੁ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kee sevaa ihu tap paravaan |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru - this is the only acceptable disciplined meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋ ਤਪਾ ਦਰਗਹਿ ਪਾਵੈ ਮਾਣੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak so tapaa darageh paavai maan |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, such a man of disciplined meditation is honored in the Court of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਤਿ ਦਿਨਸੁ ਉਪਾਇਅਨੁ ਸੰਸਾਰ ਕੀ ਵਰਤਣਿ ॥
lines.translit: raat dinas upaaeian sansaar kee varatan |
lines.english: He created the night and the day, for the activities of the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:
